channel.title: Journal of Early Modern Christianity
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Early Modern Christianity

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-frontmatter2

item.title: Theology and Philology in Biblical Translation according to Franciscus Titelmans (1502–1537) on the Example of the Book of Job
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2010

item.title: The Turn to Interiority in the Early Modern Period
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2011

item.title: William Perkins’s (1558–1602) Case Divinity as a School of Christian Prudence
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2012

item.title: Samuel Rutherford (1600–1661) and Adiaphora: The Regulative Principle of Worship and the Rule of Christ
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2013

item.title: Religious Coexistence in the Dutch Republic and France in the Seventeenth Century: Legal Systems, Sacred Spaces, and Minority Resilience in Utrecht and Nîmes
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2014

item.title: Divine Warrant and Political Discipline: Preaching on the Groningen Landdag in the Third Quarter of the Seventeenth Century in the City of Groningen
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2015

item.title: The Perils of Freethinking according to George Berkeley (1685–1753)
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2016

item.title: “Enervare atque pervertere verba illa Christi Matthaei 11”: Arguing over Matthew 11:21–22 in Luis de Molina’s (1535–1600) Concordia and Leonardus Lessius’ De gratia efficaci
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2017

item.title: Controversy in the Classroom: Jacobus Janssonius (1547–1625) versus Leonardus Lessius on Grace, Free Will and Predestination
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2019

item.title: “Capite nobis vulpes” (Song 2:15): The Struggle of Libertus Fromondus (1587–1653) with Leonardus Lessius’ Theological Legacy
item.description: Article by Anton De Preter, Wim François DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jemc-2024-2018
